entities.description: As a subsection of '3mqtt_sinewave_pub 案例', this section serves as a case study demonstrating the application of the MQTT communication protocol, specifically focusing on the sine wave publishing example.
Refers to the Message Queuing Telemetry Transport protocol, a lightweight messaging protocol used for communication in constrained environments, discussed in the context of this case study.
Refers to the specific example or demonstration provided in this section, illustrating the practical application of the MQTT communication protocol.

relations.description: The concept of 'MQTT通信协议' is the central technology discussed in this case study.
The concept of '案例' represents the specific example or demonstration presented in this section.
